creator: lightside@gmx.com
text:
Created attachment 177890
Proposed patch for x11-toolkits/scintilla (since 425459 revision)

Patch to update x11-toolkits/scintilla and editors/scite ports from 3.7.0 to 3.7.1 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://www.scintilla.org/ScintillaHistory.html

x11-toolkits/scintilla:
- Cosmetic update for files/patch-makefile

The build tested on FreeBSD 10.2 amd64.
